+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-180_TASK_2026-05-25_18-55-31+0300.md — task packet driving this run

+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1`: added a queue staging scope guard plus its
+  supporting helpers (`Convert-ToRepoRelativePath`,
+  `Convert-GlobToRegexForQueueGuard`, `Test-TaskTokenMatchesPath`,
+  `Test-LooksLikePathToken`, `Get-ActiveTaskPacketPathForQueueGuard`,
+  `Get-TaskPositiveAllowedTokens`, `Test-ActiveDispatchArtifactPath`,
+  `Test-ExactQueueLogPath`, `Get-QueueStatusEntries`,
+  `Invoke-QueueScopeGuard`) right after `Get-RepoRelativePathForQueue`, and
+  wired the guard call between `Write-DispatchLog` and the broad
+  `Git-Step @('add', '-A')` so disallowed worktree paths abort the queue
+  before any staging, commit, checkout-to-main, merge, push, or publish.
+
+### Tests
+
+- None. The TASK constraints forbid adding tests or any other source files,
+  so behavioral verification is via the canonical dispatch verify gate plus
+  in-line sanity exercises of the helper functions during execution.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None. The TASK constraints forbid touching docs, plans, status files,
+  schemas, or workflows.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+`Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1` (+251 / −0):
+
+- Introduced `Invoke-QueueScopeGuard`, called immediately after
+  `Write-DispatchLog` returns the dispatch log path and before
+  `Git-Step @('add', '-A')`. The guard reads
+  `git -c core.quotepath=false status --short --untracked-files=all`,
+  classifies every changed/deleted/renamed/copied/untracked path against the
+  active dispatch's allowed surface, and aborts via `Fail` (which releases
+  the queue lock and exits non-zero) if any disallowed path is present.
+- Allowed surfaces, in evaluation order per path:
+  1. `Test-ActiveDispatchArtifactPath` — anchored regex
+     `^ai_handoffs/([^/]+)$` enforces a single basename directly under
+     `ai_handoffs/`; the basename must match
+     `^<DispatchId>_(TASK|EXEC|CORRECT)_[^/]+\.(md|meta\.json)$`. Nested
+     paths like `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-180_EXEC_x/nested.md` and REVIEW/CLOSEOUT
+     basenames are rejected.
+  2. `Test-ExactQueueLogPath` — admits exactly the `Write-DispatchLog`
+     return path, and only when that path is directly under
+     `ai_dispatch_logs/` matching `log_*.md`. No TASK token can broaden it.

+  carry one path for normal statuses and TWO paths (old + new) for
